title: Potential hardcoded secret
description: A credential-like value appears to be hardcoded in source.
remediation: Move the secret to a managed secret store or server-only environment variable, rotate the exposed value, and ensure it is never bundled into client code.
test_guidance: Add a secret scanning regression test and verify the key is absent from built client artifacts.

title: Database lookup by ID may lack owner scope
description: A route appears to load a resource by caller-controlled ID without an obvious owner, tenant, or authorization predicate.
remediation: Require server-side authorization and constrain the query by authenticated user, organization, tenant, or explicit policy.
test_guidance: Create a regression test proving User A cannot read, update, or delete User B's resource.

title: Client-provided role or tenant trusted
description: The code appears to read role, tenant, or owner identity from request-controlled input.
remediation: Derive role, tenant, and owner information from the authenticated server-side session or token claims, then verify it server-side.
test_guidance: Add tests that tamper with role, owner, and tenant request fields.

title: Overly broad CORS configuration
description: CORS appears to allow every origin.
remediation: Restrict CORS origins to known application origins and avoid wildcard origins with credentials.
test_guidance: Verify untrusted origins are denied and trusted origins receive expected CORS headers.

title: Supabase service role key may be exposed
description: A Supabase service role key or server-only Supabase credential appears in code.
remediation: Keep service role keys server-side only, rotate exposed keys, and verify RLS is enabled on sensitive tables.
test_guidance: Assert service role keys are absent from frontend bundles and public environment variables.

title: AI call may lack cost or abuse controls
description: An AI API call was found without nearby rate, token, timeout, or budget controls.
remediation: Add per-user rate limits, token caps, request timeouts, and budget enforcement around AI calls.
test_guidance: Add tests for token limit, timeout, and repeated-call throttling behavior.

title: SQL query uses request input
description: A SQL query string appears to be built from caller-controlled request input.
remediation: Use parameterized queries or a query builder that binds user input instead of concatenating it into SQL.
test_guidance: Add regression tests with quote and boolean payloads and assert the query remains parameterized.

title: NoSQL query trusts request body
description: A NoSQL lookup appears to pass request body fields directly into a query object.
remediation: Validate and allowlist request fields before passing them to NoSQL query operators.
test_guidance: Add tests with operator payloads such as `$ne` and `$gt` and assert they are rejected.

title: Untrusted HTML rendered into page
description: React dangerouslySetInnerHTML appears to render caller-controlled HTML.
remediation: Avoid raw HTML rendering or sanitize with a well-maintained sanitizer before rendering.
test_guidance: Add regression tests proving script/event-handler payloads are escaped or removed.

title: Request data reflected into HTML
description: Request-controlled data appears to be concatenated into an HTML response.
remediation: Escape reflected values, render with a safe template engine, or return structured data instead of HTML.
test_guidance: Add tests proving reflected HTML/script payloads are encoded in responses.

title: Server fetches caller-controlled URL
description: Server-side fetch appears to use a URL controlled by the request.
remediation: Allowlist destination hosts, reject private networks, re-check DNS after resolution, and bound redirects/timeouts.
test_guidance: Add tests for localhost, link-local, RFC1918, redirect, and DNS-rebinding attempts.

title: File path uses request input
description: Filesystem access appears to build a path from request-controlled input.
remediation: Resolve paths inside an allowlisted base directory and reject traversal, symlinks, and absolute paths.
test_guidance: Add tests for `../`, encoded traversal, absolute paths, and symlink escape.

title: Upload writes caller-controlled file name
description: Uploaded file data appears to be written with a caller-controlled file name.
remediation: Generate server-side object names, validate extension/content type, scan content, and store outside executable paths.
test_guidance: Add upload tests for traversal names, executable extensions, oversize payloads, and wrong MIME types.

title: Authentication endpoint may lack rate limiting
description: A login/authentication route was found without nearby throttling, lockout, or rate-limit controls.
remediation: Add per-account and per-IP throttling, bounded retries, and audit logging around authentication attempts.
test_guidance: Add tests that repeated failed login attempts are slowed, blocked, and logged.

title: Debug endpoint exposes runtime internals
description: Debug code appears to expose environment variables, stack traces, or runtime internals.
remediation: Remove debug endpoints from production builds or protect them with explicit admin-only server-side authorization.
test_guidance: Add route tests proving debug endpoints are absent or return 404/403 in production mode.

title: Public source map exposes source paths
description: A public source map appears to expose original source paths or bundled source metadata.
remediation: Disable public production source maps or restrict access to authenticated engineering workflows.
test_guidance: Add deployment checks proving `.map` assets are not publicly served in production.

title: Supabase RLS policy allows every row
description: A Supabase row-level security policy appears to use an always-true predicate.
remediation: Constrain RLS policies to `auth.uid()`, tenant membership, or an equivalent authorization predicate.
test_guidance: Add policy tests proving one user cannot read another user's rows.

title: Supabase storage bucket is public
description: A Supabase storage bucket appears to be created or configured as public.
remediation: Keep private buckets private and use signed URLs or server-side authorization for object access.
test_guidance: Add storage policy tests proving anonymous users cannot read private objects.

title: Tracker loads before consent
description: A tracking script appears to load before consent or preference checks.
remediation: Gate tracker creation behind an explicit consent state and persist user preferences.
test_guidance: Add browser tests proving trackers are not requested before consent.

title: Environment file exposes credentials
description: A committed environment file appears to contain concrete credentials.
remediation: Remove committed environment files, rotate exposed values, and provide a redacted example file instead.
test_guidance: Add repository checks that reject committed `.env` files with concrete secret values.

title: Authentication bypass switch detected
description: Authentication logic appears to grant privileged access from a debug, bypass, or request-controlled switch.
remediation: Remove bypass branches and require normal authentication and authorization for privileged code paths.
test_guidance: Add tests proving debug/bypass parameters do not authenticate users or grant admin roles.

title: Weak password reset token
description: Password-reset logic appears to derive reset tokens from predictable user data or timestamps.
remediation: Generate high-entropy single-use reset tokens, hash them at rest, expire them quickly, and bind them to the account.
test_guidance: Add tests that reset tokens are random, single-use, expired correctly, and never derived from email or timestamps.

title: Signup endpoint may lack abuse controls
description: Signup logic appears to create accounts without throttling, proof-of-work, captcha, invite, or email verification controls.
remediation: Add abuse controls such as rate limits, email verification, and suspicious signup throttling.
test_guidance: Add tests proving repeated signup attempts are throttled and unverified accounts are constrained.

title: OTP endpoint may allow flooding
description: OTP sending logic appears to send codes without throttling or cooldown controls.
remediation: Add per-user and per-destination OTP cooldowns, rate limits, and abuse monitoring.
test_guidance: Add tests proving repeated OTP requests are rate-limited and logged.

title: State-changing route may lack CSRF protection
description: A state-changing route appears to process cookie-backed requests without CSRF token validation.
remediation: Require a CSRF token or same-site strict session strategy for browser state-changing requests.
test_guidance: Add tests proving requests without valid CSRF tokens are rejected.

title: Archive extraction may be unsafe
description: Archive extraction appears to use bulk extraction without path validation.
remediation: Validate every archive member path before extraction and reject traversal, symlinks, hardlinks, and oversized archives.
test_guidance: Add tests for Zip Slip, symlink escape, duplicate paths, and archive bombs.

title: Security headers are disabled or missing
description: Security header middleware appears disabled or important headers are explicitly disabled.
remediation: Enable security headers including CSP, HSTS, frame protections, and content-type protections where appropriate.
test_guidance: Add HTTP tests proving expected security headers are present in production responses.

title: Session cookie lacks protective attributes
description: Session cookie configuration appears to omit secure, httpOnly, or sameSite protections.
remediation: Set `httpOnly`, `secure`, and strict or lax `sameSite` attributes on session cookies.
test_guidance: Add response tests proving session cookies include secure attributes in production.

title: Dockerfile runs as root
description: A Dockerfile appears to run the application as root.
remediation: Create and switch to an unprivileged user before running application code.
test_guidance: Add container tests proving the runtime user is non-root.

title: Infrastructure allows public ingress
description: Infrastructure-as-code appears to allow unrestricted public ingress.
remediation: Restrict ingress CIDR ranges and ports to the minimum trusted sources.
test_guidance: Add IaC policy tests rejecting `0.0.0.0/0` on sensitive ingress rules.

title: Staging or internal surface exposed
description: Staging, internal, or preview functionality appears to be publicly exposed.
remediation: Require authentication or network allowlists for staging and internal surfaces.
test_guidance: Add tests proving staging routes are unavailable to anonymous users.

title: Supabase table missing RLS enablement
description: A Supabase table is created without nearby row-level security enablement.
remediation: Enable RLS on every sensitive table and add scoped policies before exposing data.
test_guidance: Add migration tests proving every sensitive table enables RLS.

title: Firebase rules allow public access
description: Firebase security rules appear to allow all reads or writes.
remediation: Require authenticated users and resource ownership checks in Firebase rules.
test_guidance: Add emulator tests proving anonymous users cannot read or write protected data.

title: Build script executes caller-controlled shell
description: Build tooling appears to execute a shell command built from environment or caller-controlled data.
remediation: Avoid shell interpolation in build scripts and pass arguments as arrays with allowlisted values.
test_guidance: Add tests proving build inputs cannot inject shell metacharacters.

title: Credentials may be written to logs
description: Logging code appears to write secrets, tokens, passwords, or full environment objects.
remediation: Redact sensitive fields before logging and avoid logging complete request bodies or environment maps.
test_guidance: Add log redaction tests for tokens, cookies, passwords, and connection strings.
